long_description:
Affected support: Onsite Resource Availability - Team Coverage Withdrawn (Morning) - MAD04
Location: mad04
Ensuring Shift Coverage in MAD04 for the morning shift from 07:30 to  16:00 (local time) due to MEF
short_description: Onsite Resource Availability - Team Coverage Withdrawn (Morning) - MAD04
close_notes: Site Unattended - Manager on call for Sev1 issues
current_status_next_steps: MAD02 is watching the queues and will call the manager if any sev1  issue might arise. Manager is on call
